reviews.title: Mouldy
reviews.text:
I arrived at the property a bit disappointed because there was no air con as listed on the description when booking. Not a huge deal because the fan sufficed for the most part and it’s quite a cold area.

My problem is the mouldy rooms. I was in two, both the same, the second worse than the first. I don’t understand how these places can lack such hygiene as to not even clean mould, or even attempt to clean it. It was literally everywhere, every corner of the room. Really disgusting.
Staff didn’t speak English at all. 
I guess the location was decent?

I would recommend to stay somewhere else if traveling to Da Lat.

reviews.title: très décevant
reviews.negatives:
Nous avons été extrêmement déçu de cet hôtel. 
Pourtant, nous avons l’habitude de voyager. 
Nous avions pris deux chambres, ils nous ont mis au sous-sol sans fenêtre. Contrairement aux photos qui indiquaient des chambres lumineuses…
Une des chambres sentait la cigarette on aurait dit un fumoir. On sentait tellement l’humidité que le sol était mouillé. Nos vêtements n’ont pas pu sécher pendant 2 jours (il avait plu dehors). 

Et enfin nous avons essayé de prendre un bus via l’hôtel et le personnel ne savait pas nous répondre.

reviews.response:

First of all with all my regrets, I would like to apologize profoundly to you. The fault of the hotel I seriously affected your experience during your stay at the hotel. You should know this, after reviewing your review, we have done a thorough review to ensure that you do not repeat these errors in the future.
We are happy to once again try our experience at our hotel.

The best,
Tai, Sales Manager

reviews.title: Be Careful
reviews.text:
Don’t get me wrong this place is cheap for what you get. However we were put in a room in the basement, yep that’s right, below ground level, so no window, fresh air or light for us. The pillows are mouldy, so we asked for some fresh ones,  they were replaced with some other mouldy pillows, good to know there is consistency. 
We also booked to do a countryside tour the next day, despite the fact the it said on the brochure that the tour starts at 8am, we were told to be in the lobby for pick up at 7:30, that’s normal, probably a few different locations to be picked up from. Our tour Guide then arrives at 8:10 and we are booked in on the wrong tour. This was all probably due to a lack of communication because despite stating on their page that they speak English, the receptionist knew very little, about the same level as my Vietnamese and I certainly would not be advertising that I knew Vietnamese.
Do yourself a favour and spend a few extra dollars and go somewhere better.

reviews.title: Male staff's attitude is so terrible.
reviews.text:
We stayed at this hotel for 03 nights 03 days. At the first day, our all new  toothbrushes were taken away by cleaning staff, no sorry at all. And also on the first day, hotel manager requested us to leave hotel and they would take us to another one. Of course we refused because we booked at this hotel and would not move no anywhere. I did not know how the hell this hotel is working.
On the second day, one again, hotel manager forced us to change room because they accepted booking from a big family and they required to stay on the same floor. As I wrote, they forced us to move, otherwise, our luggage would be taken out. This is the number of male staff who had a very terrible attitude: (+84) 979.047.741.
Swear to God, this is the first time of my life that I have stay in such hotel. Thanks to God that all the female's attitude are quite good and at last, everything were ok.
Of course, I will never come back to this hotel. Da Lat city has many beautiful and warm hotel that I have to return to Nam Xuan. This name is now in my black list forever.

reviews.title: Bad customer service!
reviews.text:
For your information, I have booked this hotel 3 times. It's actually a safe choice for you guys. I rated Value of money and Staff AWFUL because of their customer service.

Before Lunar new year 2018 (1/2/2018), I booked for 2 nights, than because of my issues, we must cancel the plan, I cannot refund in Agoda, therefore, I contact directly to hotel, by the contact number on their website. A male staff promised that they will refund the money to me and ask me do not cancel the booking in agoda, they will open a new room for another customer. After the deal's done, they confirmed that there's a customer used my room. And promise that they will return to me on 4/3/2018. 

On 20/3/2018 , I send a message ask for my money, then they say sorry, and promise they will transfer money after some days ( not specific ). I am not sure about it. Just share to all of you guys know this case.

Thank

reviews.title: Not highly recommended
reviews.text:
There are things that should be commented:
1. The price with Agoda was not expensive. That was OK.
2. It takes around 5 mins by motorbike to the city's center. That was really good 
3. The room was good enough but only for single person. For the 1-bed room, there's no windows which makes it feel uncomfortable for breathing or enjoying the atmosphere. The 3-bed room was really OK
The room was quite small. Facilities was enough but not at excellent condition: the shower, the toilets and the bed were not in good shape 
4. The only person we liked was the boy who worked at night shift. He was supportive with our request for changing room, borrowing necessary stuffs or medicine. The other ones were not nice enough with simply cold faces. 
We spent 5 nights at this hotel and the experience was not really good. The only thing we want to do was just to sleep at nighttime and to get out at day light. 
We'll never consider this place. Ever.

reviews.title: basic service with acceptable price
reviews.text: I stayed 2 nights with the triple room. The hotel looks newly built so facilities are clean and new. It is based on the narrow path at the city-center area, about 1-2km far away from Dalat market and popular tourism places by taxi. Many good restaurants around. There are two things I am concerned: 1. It's a bit inconvenient when the bathroom including the toilet and the washing sink are not separated and there is no place to put towels and toilet papers inside. When taking shower, the water makes the whole bathroom fully wet. 2.There is no clean room service though i stayed 2 nights. The receptionist told me that normally the cleaner will auto-clean every room in the morning: change new towels and take the rubbish, when guests go out. But this did not happen to my room when my family went back the hotel in the afternoon. And No new water bottles for the second night stay. Overall, with the amount paid for the 3 beds room, it's acceptable for 2 nights.

reviews.title: One of the Best Budget Hotels
reviews.text: The space can be tight for two. Air conditioner is not available due to the chilly weather but table fan and hair dryer were provided. Motorbikes (the auto transmission scooter and semi-auto bikes, without clutch) are available for rent at the receptionist (100k NVD for semi and slightly more expensive for full auto bikes per day), together with the not-so-safe helmets for two.  There are no places of interest that can be reached on foot, except for a few restaurants and convenience stores. A few local eateries, a massage parlour, and multiple hotels sprawled on the same street. Receptionists were not good in English. Daily housekeeping are available. No complementary drinking water. There's also a glass window/panel on top of the door, could be a huge problem for those who need to sleep in total darkness. Poor sound proofing of the room, you can literally hear people showering in the adjacent room.

reviews.title: Need to improve mattress size & wifi.
reviews.text:
Pros:
1. The market is 1.7 km away, less than 5 minutes by motorbike.
2. There is an elevator, hot water is quick, clean, and friendly.
3. Reasonable price. I have stayed here a few times!

Cons:
1. The bed is small, two people can't turn around.
2. The Wi-Fi is always weak and disconnects.
3. The room lighting color should be changed or brighter lights should be added; it feels a bit dark in the bathroom causing eye strain.

4. Occasionally noisy.

- If improvements are made, I will continue to come back.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Can't think of anything I was a fan of.
reviews.negatives:
Probably my worst hotel experience in SE Asia so far. The room is damp, so damp that nothing in there will ever dry and stuff that was dry has a layer of moisture after being in there a while.

The bed is uncomfortable as the mattress is hard (and always feels damp), the hotel is loud with people making noise and shouting at 6:30 each of the three mornings we were there.

We gave them our laundry, they lost half of it, stained the other half of it and all the whites came back with a yellow hue. All in all, I couldn't wait to leave.

reviews.title: It's cheap .. but clean
reviews.positives:
The price was good .. 
It was clean ..
reviews.negatives:
The lean receptionist was always quite rude. The other (slightly shorter) receptionist was very friendly and welcoming.

I extended the stay by one day, after the initial 5 days. I was told the price was 3.85 Vnd.
But when I booked through MMT it was 1/3rd the cost. They said it was the basement room.
It looked identical to the 1st floor room, with no windows / except a small opening above the door.
But despite the hotel being empty, they made me go down for exactly same size room.

On 2nd & 3rd night there were guests who were so loud till late at night and woke up at 5am, and when I mentioned it to the receptionist and why no one are saying anything .. she didn't even apologize.


It's quite inside from the main road, and it's steep going down.

reviews.title: New hotel with powerful shower
reviews.text: Hotel is brand new and well renovated. I stayed in a basement room that has a public toilet beside our room though. They should do something to cover up the see through glass on top of the main door too. Very clean and good shower facilities (quite rare in Vietnam hotels). Location isn't that convenient though, need to walk a distance to the night market. Staff able to speak fluent English as well. No complimentary water. Book through online channels if you want cheaper price. Encountered a walk-in customer who paif 3 times of my discounted price.
reviews.response:
Thanks for your sincere suggestions. We were very receptive and made a decal at the door above the main door to reduce the amount of light thrown into the room. Our small change will make our customers happy.
Once again, thank you for choosing Nam Xuan premium hotel.
It is our pleasure to welcome you and your family in the coming times. And you will be satisfied with the changes of the hotel.
Best regards,
Mr Tai - CEO

reviews.title: Excellent value for money and ideal location
reviews.text:
Perfect location to discover the heart of Da Lat, just a few minute walk to Xuan Huong Lake and some vibrant streets of the city.
Compared to the incredibly reasonable price, Nam Xuan offered our family a very good service. The staff was helpful. There was sufficient parking space. The room is spacious enough for 4 people with two queen size beds. Big window is a plus with aplenty of sunlight and cozy breezes, there was no need to use the fan or air conditioner at all.
Highly recommend for any travellers to Da Lat!

Ideally they would do a breakfast but there are many places nearby to eat. Overall, though, it is a great place to stay and would recommend to anyone!

reviews.response:
Chào anh Thiên,

Lời đầu tiên, khách sạn xin cảm ơn sự ủng hộ của anh và mọi người khi đã lưu trú tại khách sạn Nam Xuân. Kế đến, chúng tôi muốn xin lỗi, bởi vì thiếu sót nhỏ của khách sạn ảnh hưởng đến chất lượng kỳ nghĩ của mình tại Đà Lạt. Chúng tôi muốn anh biết là chúng tôi đã thực hiện rà soát và điều chỉnh lại các quy trình để tránh sai sót trên lặp lại trong tương lai.
Một lần nữa, tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn anh đã ủng hộ khách sạn Nam Xuan Premium. Hi vọng, chúng tôi có dịp đón tiếp anh cùng gia đình hay bạn bè trong kỳ nghĩ tiếp theo tại Thành Phố Đà Lạt.

Trân Trọng,

reviews.title: Voltage stabilizer
reviews.text:
Reading the pre-comments, I see a lot of criticism about the staff, but I found the reception staff to be very enthusiastic and gentle. The male staff in the evening was present and eager to help; I felt sorry for him when I called him twice at 4 AM and 5 AM to wake him up, but he immediately got up to help me open the door. The female staff during the day was also very thoughtful and friendly. I checked out late due to the rain, but she assisted me very enthusiastically. When I wanted to book another night, she guided me and got everything ready very quickly.

Regarding the room, I found the price to be cheap, decent, clean, and fragrant. The locks and safety measures were quite reassuring. The only thing I didn't like was that the soundproofing was a bit poor; at night, when the door was opened or water was running from the next room, it was very audible. One night, I was startled awake when a guest returned late. Other than that, I think everything was okay. Next time I visit Da Lat, I will definitely stop by again.

reviews.title: Good place on the quiet side of town
reviews.text: This place was good, clean, and cozy. No air conditioning in our room but given the outside highs(23-24 Celcius) the fan was sufficient. Elevator for if a guys got heavy bags. Scooter rentals were available for pretty cheap , though we were able to walk to most places we desired to go . The room was clean. At this point we still only knew how to say "hello, goodbye, and thank you,"  so you will need Google translate to communicate w/staff if you're ill prepared like us. Not getting free meals for advertising, but there is a fantastic restaurant by the sinh tourist station close by (address: 26 Bui Thi Xuan , Da Lat) . The morning pho and shrimp fried rice were staples on our stay. Bed was made / bathroom tidied daily. All in all , great place for the value.
